provenance: Self-captured regression baseline: serialized from this crate's own generate_toolpaths implementation (packet 112 Step 4 / T-223; re-recorded in Step 9D when width/offset derivation switched from a geometric approximation to BeadingStrategy::compute(); re-recorded again in the D-112-MMU-TOPOLOGY busy-hub fix (skeletal_trapezoidation::propagation's apply_transitions/insert_node DCEL + position-rescale + mirror-target corrections) since the prior baseline's inset_count=1 was itself a symptom of the same graph-construction bug this fix corrects — see docs/DEVIATION_LOG.md D-112-MMU-TOPOLOGY for the full evidence trail). NOT derived from, and not a substitute for, OrcaSlicer ground truth — no OrcaSlicer oracle exists for this step, and the per-edge width/offset/bead- placement/dedup rules are an intentional from-first-principles adaptation (see generate_toolpaths.rs's module-level doc comment). Locks in current behavior for regression purposes only.
